A city with 10 million AI agents that are smarter than 99% of all humans. This will become reality in 2026 and many people will wake up one day in shock and ask themselves where this came from.

Most people will still be “learning AI” in 2026.

A small group will be shipping, automating, and replacing workflows with it.

These 9 skills decide which side you’re on 

• Prompt Engineering
(ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)

• AI Workflow Automation
(Zapier, Make, n8n)

• AI

Here’s a summary for everyone who could not read to the end:

1. Most people underestimate AI because they’re judging it by outdated 2023 versions.

2. Frontier AI models in 2026 demonstrate real judgment, reasoning, and autonomy.

3. AI progress has entered a self-improving
